message:
fix: strict equality checks, reduced-motion support, and UI polish

Correctness and accessibility improvements across 9 files:

beads-view.tsx:
- Replace loose == null checks with explicit === null || === undefined
  for stricter type safety in vendor script detection

site-footer.tsx:
- Add useReducedMotion() support to disable pulse, bounce, and
  scroll-to-top animations for accessibility
- Add suppressHydrationWarning on year span for SSR compatibility

screenshot-gallery.tsx:
- Add responsive sizes attribute to images based on column count
- Fix grid breakpoint consistency

tweet-wall.tsx:
- Replace loose != null with typeof === "number" for strict type guards

glossary/page.tsx:
- Replace <Streamdown> component with plain text for term.short to
  avoid unnecessary markdown parsing on simple strings

how-it-was-built/page.tsx:
- Whitespace cleanup and trailing newline normalization
- Add how-it-was-built public assets directory

streamdown.tsx, war-story-card.tsx, lib/utils.ts:
- Minor refinements for consistency

Skipped ephemeral: a.out, ._* macOS resource forks, Chrome screenshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
